title: HR Recruiter Intern
description:
🔹 About SETOO

SETOO Solutions is an IT, AI, and Digital Engineering company providing technology, staffing, and delivery solutions to clients across industries.

Through SETOO Talent, we manage end-to-end hiring, staffing, onboarding, and workforce operations for internal teams, clients, and vendor partners.

We are looking for a proactive HR Recruiter Intern who can support recruitment, HR operations, documentation, and onboarding activities while working closely with business and delivery teams.

🔹 Role Summary

The HR Recruiter Intern will be responsible for supporting end-to-end recruitment for internal hiring and staff augmentation, along with onboarding coordination. The role requires strong screening ability, effective communication, and structured documentation management.

🔹 Key Responsibilities 1. Recruitment & Talent Acquisition


Understand hiring requirements and assist in preparing Job Descriptions (JD)
Coordinate JD approvals before publishing
Source candidates through job portals, social media, and internal databases
Conduct resume screening and basic candidate evaluation
Schedule and coordinate interviews
Maintain communication with candidates and hiring managers
Support salary discussion and expectation alignment
Assist in offer rollout and joining coordination
Ensure professional rejection communication
Monitor emails and respond to candidate queries
Candidate Experience Management
Ensure clear and timely communication throughout the hiring process
Maintain a positive candidate experience
Represent SETOO’s employer brand professionally
Onboarding Responsibilities
Manage pre-onboarding communication and document collection
Ensure completion of KYC, education, and experience documents
Initiate and track Background Verification (BGV)
Coordinate joining formalities and Day 1 onboarding
Maintain employee folders and documentation
Update employee master data and onboarding trackers
Coordinate with HR/Admin/IT teams for smooth onboarding
Staff Augmentation & Client Hiring
Support recruitment for contract and client-based roles
Screen candidates as per client requirements
Coordinate with clients, vendors, and internal teams
Maintain candidate pipeline for client needs
Client & Vendor Coordination
Schedule interviews with clients and vendors
Share candidate profiles in required formats
Maintain clear communication with stakeholders
Support client onboarding documentation
Contract Position Management
Assist in onboarding and offboarding of contract employees
Coordinate BGV for contract hires
Maintain NDA, agreements, and vendor documentation
Track engagement and performance of contract employees
Recruitment Documentation & Tracking
Maintain recruitment trackers and reports
Update screening sheets, interview trackers, and offer trackers
Maintain client/vendor communication logs
Ensure audit-ready documentation
Coordination with Sales Team
Work closely with the sales team for staffing requirements
Understand client hiring needs and timelines
Support candidate pipeline readiness


🔹 Key Skills Required


Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Logical candidate screening ability
Basic understanding of IT roles and technologies
Good coordination and stakeholder management
Strong documentation and organizational skills
Ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently
Proficiency in Excel, job portals, and recruitment tools


Note: This is a paid internship.Skills: documentation,it,onboarding,communication,recruitment,screening,recruiter,hiring
Show more

title: Human Resources Intern
description:
Job Title: Human Resources (HR) Intern – Paid Internship




Company: Remotohire

Location: Remote (Work From Home)

Job Type: Internship · Full-Time · Paid

Duration: 6 Months




Working Hours: 10:30 AM – 7:30 PM (IST)




About Remotohire




Remotohire is a remote-first hiring and tech solutions company connecting global businesses with talented professionals. We work across industries, delivering creative, marketing, and technology solutions to help brands grow in competitive markets.




About the Role




We are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Human Resources Intern to join our HR team. This is a 6-month paid, full-time remote internship ideal for candidates who want hands-on experience in recruitment, HR operations, and employee engagement.




We are looking for an immediate joiner who is ready to start right away.




Key Responsibilities




Assist in end-to-end recruitment (job posting, sourcing, screening, scheduling interviews).
Shortlist candidates from LinkedIn and job portals.
Coordinate interviews and follow up with candidates.
Maintain and update HR databases and employee records.
Support onboarding and documentation processes.
Assist in employee engagement and HR administrative tasks.
Prepare reports and recruitment trackers in Excel/Google Sheets.




Required Candidate Profile




Pursuing or recently completed a degree in HR, Business Administration, or related field.
Strong interest in recruitment and HR operations.
Good communication and coordination skills.
Basic knowledge of LinkedIn and job portals.
Comfortable working remotely (10:30 AM – 7:30 PM IST).
Available to join immediately.




What We Offer




Paid 6-month internship.
100% Remote work opportunity.
Practical exposure to real-time recruitment and HR processes.
Mentorship and potential full-time opportunity based on performance.




How to Apply




Apply via LinkedIn with your updated resume

title: Cold Calling Intern
description:
About Eumentis

At Eumentis Informatics (eumentis.com) we are a team of IIT Delhi graduates with a mission to use technology to bring tranquility to the lives of our clients.

• We provide AI-powered calling solutions designed to automate customer outreach, lead qualification, and communication workflows — especially for industries like real estate. Our AI calling platform enables businesses to manage large-scale campaigns, collect structured call data, and improve operational effi-ciency through intelligent automation




Job Summary

We are looking for enthusiastic interns to support our lead generation efforts through outbound cold calling. The role involves connecting with potential prospects, understanding their requirements, qualifying leads, and scheduling meetings for the sales team. This is a great opportunity for candidates who want hands-on exposure to sales and business development.




Key Responsibilities

• Make cold calls to potential leads and prospects 

• Introduce company services in a clear and professional manner 

• Understand prospect requirements and identify potential opportunities 

• Qualify leads based on defined criteria 

• Schedule meetings and demo calls with prospects for the sales team 

• Maintain call logs and update lead status in Apollo

• Follow up with interested prospects through calls, WhatsApp, email, or LinkedIn 

• Work closely with the sales team to improve conversion rates 

• Participate in regular training sessions to improve communication and sales skills 

• Provide daily updates on calls made, responses, and meetings booked 




Candidate Requirements

• Graduate / pursuing graduation in BBA, BCom, MBA, Marketing, or related fields 

• Strong verbal communication skills in English.

• Confident in speaking with new people over calls 

• Basic understanding of sales and customer interaction 

• Good follow-up and convincing skills 

• Self-motivated and eager to learn sales processes 




Job Benefits

• Stipend: ₹5,000 per Month

• Location: Pune 

• Work Mode: Hybrid (WFO during training period)

• Being a part of a rapidly growing organization.

• Great scope for innovation while creating and implementing new systems.

• Working with a group of highly motivated and experienced individuals

• Becoming part of an amazing work environment.

• Greatly improve your skills by handling a wide range of responsibilities leading to more opportunities for future growth.

title: Graphic Design Intern
description:
Graphic Design Intern




Location: Work from Office – Dhanori, Pune

Type: Internship

Duration: 3–6 Months

Stipend: 7-12K




About the Role

We are Witrex, a fast-paced, AI-forward startup looking for a creative Graphic Design Intern who is passionate about visual storytelling. This role is perfect for someone who wants hands-on experience working on real projects, creating engaging graphics, and learning how design works in a fast-moving startup environment.




You will work closely with our design and marketing teams to create social media creatives, marketing assets, and visual content that help communicate our brand effectively. If you’re eager to learn, experiment, and grow your design skills, this is the place for you.




Responsibilities

Assist in designing social media creatives, marketing visuals, and digital assets
Support the team with graphic design tasks for campaigns and brand communication
Create visually engaging designs aligned with brand guidelines
Collaborate with the team to brainstorm creative ideas
Stay updated with current design trends and tools




Requirements

Knowledge of Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator
Understanding of design fundamentals such as typography, color, and layout
Willingness to learn and adapt in a fast-paced environment
Portfolio showcasing design work (academic or personal projects)







Highly Preferred ⭐

If you know about video editing (Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar), please mention it in your application. Candidates with video editing skills will be highly preferred.




Ready to create with us?

Mail your Resume and Portfolio to devendra.walkoli@witrex.co

title: Sales And Marketing Intern
description:
Company Description

AJ's Kitchen Cartel, founded in 2021, serves both the Retail and Hospitality industries by providing high-quality meat products for their daily needs. All products are Individually Quick Frozen (IQF), ensuring superior taste, consistent quality, and year-round availability. Our mission is to deliver fresh, convenient, and reliable meat solutions that meet the evolving needs of our clients. Based in Pune City, we are committed to maintaining high food safety standards and customer satisfaction.




Role Description

This is a full-time hybrid role for a Sales and Marketing Intern based in Pune City, with flexibility for some work on field assignments. The intern will assist with sales outreach, customer service, and marketing initiatives to promote AJ's Kitchen Cartel. Responsibilities include building and maintaining relationships with clients, supporting sales strategies, delivering product training to clients as needed, and contributing to the execution of marketing campaigns. The role also involves coordinating with internal teams to ensure customer requirements are met and gathering market insights to support decision-making.




Qualifications

Strong skills in Communication and Customer Service
Proficiency in Sales and Sales Management
Excellent organizational and problem-solving abilities
Self-motivated, with the ability to work both independently and in a collaborative environment
Prior experience or knowledge in the food or hospitality industry is a plus
Currently pursuing or holding a degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field

title: Junior Engineer- Intern
description:
We're looking for a Junior Engineer- Intern This role is Office Based, Pune Office

As an Intern QA, you will be responsible for ensuring the quality and reliability of software products through the design, development, and execution of automated test scripts. Your primary focus will be on creating, maintaining, and executing test scripts to identify and report software defects. You will work closely with the development team to understand software requirements and implement efficient automated test strategies. This role offers an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software testing and automation.

In This Role You Will


Develop automated test scripts using in-house developed test automation tools and frameworks.
Collaborate with the development team to understand software requirements and provide input on testability.
Execute automated test cases to verify software functionality and reliability.
 Identify, analyze, and report software defects, and work with the development team to resolve them.
Create and maintain test data, test environments, and test documentation.
Participate in test planning, test estimation, and test strategy discussions.
Contribute to the continuous improvement of the test automation process and tools.
Stay up to date with the latest testing methodologies, tools, and technologies.
 Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure high-quality software releases.
Follow industry best practices for software testing and maintain high standards of quality.


You Have What It Takes If You Have


BE/B.Tech in Computer Science (or equivalent)
Strong knowledge of software testing concepts, methodologies, and techniques.
Basic understanding of software development life cycle (SDLC) and agile methodologies.
Familiarity with at least one programming language, such as Java, Python.
Experience or knowledge of test automation tools and frameworks, such as Selenium WebDriver, Playwright, Appium, or
TestNG.
Good analytical and problem-solving skills to identify, analyze, and debug software defects.
Excellent attention to detail and a passion for delivering high-quality software.
Strong communication skills to collaborate effectively with team members.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.
Strong willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies and tools.
Familiarity with TestNG, JUnit, Jenkins, Jira, TestRail.


Our Culture

Spark Greatness. Shatter Boundaries. Share Success. Are you ready? Because here, right now – is where the future of work is happening. Where curious disruptors and change innovators like you are helping communities and customers enable everyone – anywhere – to learn, grow and advance. To be better tomorrow than they are today.

Who We Are

Cornerstone powers the potential of organizations and their people to thrive in a changing world. Cornerstone Galaxy, the complete AI-powered workforce agility platform, meets organizations where they are. With Galaxy, organizations can identify skills gaps and development opportunities, retain and engage top talent, and provide multimodal learning experiences to meet the diverse needs of the modern workforce. More than 7,000 organizations and 100 million+ users in 180+ countries and in nearly 50 languages use Cornerstone Galaxy to build high-performing, future-ready organizations and people today.

Check us out on LinkedIn , Comparably , Glassdoor , and Facebook !


Show more

title: Graduate Engineering Trainee
description:
Job Title: GET – Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineer (R&D)

Company: Frido

Location: Pune, India

Role Type: (On site)

Department: Research & Development




Role Overview

We are looking for a Graduate Engineer Trainee (GET) in Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineering to join

our R&D team. The role involves working on end-to-end product development including design,

prototyping, validation, and integration of mechanical, electronic, and control systems.

This is a hands-on role suited for candidates who are curious, adaptable, and eager to work in a fast

paced, innovation-driven startup environment.




Key Responsibilities

• Assist in product design and development from concept to prototype.

• Create and modify 3D CAD models, assemblies, and technical drawings.

• Perform basic CAE/FEA analysis for design validation and optimization.

• Work on mechanical-electronic integration for functional prototypes.

• Develop and test basic embedded/control logic for prototypes.

• Support testing, validation, and iteration of designs.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams (electronics, software, manufacturing).

• Participate in research, benchmarking, and design improvement activities.




Required Skills & Qualifications

Education

B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical / Mechatronics Engineering (Freshers / Recent Graduates)




Technical Skills

Design & CAD

• Understanding of mechanical design principles

• Proficiency in at least one CAD tool:

o SolidWorks / Creo / NX / CATIA or equivalent




CAE / Simulation

• Basic understanding of FEA concepts

• Exposure to tools such as:

o ANSYS Workbench / SolidWorks Simulation or equivalent




Electronics, Controls & Embedded Systems

• Fundamental understanding of electronics and control systems

• Hands-on experience with microcontrollers / embedded platforms:

o Arduino, Raspberry Pi, ESP32, Jetson Nano or equivalent




Soft Skills & Attributes

• Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking

• Ability to learn quickly and adapt in a dynamic environment

• Willingness to take ownership and responsibility

• Comfortable working in a startup / fast-paced R&D setting

• Good communication and teamwork skills




Good to Have (Preferred)

• Experience with prototyping tools (3D printing, basic fabrication)

• Exposure to product development lifecycle

• Basic knowledge of materials and manufacturing processes

• Experience with interfacing sensors, motors, or actuators

• Interest in interdisciplinary systems (mechanical + electronics + software)




What You’ll Gain

• Hands-on exposure to real-world product development

• Opportunity to work on innovative, user-centric products

• Cross-domain learning across mechanical, electronics, and embedded systems

• Fast growth in a high-impact R&D environment




Interested candidates can share their CV on sanobar.s@myfrido.com

Target Candidate Personas

title: Sales Intern
description:
Job Title: Sales Intern (Full-Time | 6 Months | US Market Focus)




Role Overview




We are hiring a driven, high-energy Sales Intern for a 6-month full-time internship designed for individuals who want to become full-cycle sales professionals (“closers-in-the-making”).




This role is specifically focused on the North America market, requiring strong communication skills and the ability to engage with international prospects.




This is not a typical lead generation role. You will take ownership of the early-to-mid sales cycle—from identifying prospects and initiating conversations to coordinating meetings and supporting deal progression.




While LinkedIn will be your primary channel, you are expected to operate as a true “hunter”, leveraging multiple channels including cold calls, personalized outreach, and networking opportunities to build and manage a strong pipeline.




You will work closely with Sales Leads and the Solutions Team, gaining hands-on exposure to real B2B sales conversations, objections, and deal dynamics.

Internship Details




Duration: 6 Months (Full-Time – 8 Hours/Day)
Working Hours: 6:00 PM – 3:00 AM IST (US Shift – Mandatory)
Stipend: ₹10,000 per month
Location: Remote
Growth Path: High performers will be considered for a Pre-Placement Offer (PPO)


Key Responsibilities




1. End-to-End Sales Coordination

Own scheduling, follow-ups, and communication across the sales cycle. Act as the primary bridge between prospects and internal teams until deal closure.

2. Lead Generation & Research

Identify and qualify high-potential prospects using LinkedIn, AI-powered research tools, and structured prospecting methods.

3. Omnichannel Outreach

Engage prospects through:

Cold calling
Personalized LinkedIn outreach
Professional email communication
4. Strategic Outreach

Customize messaging based on a clear understanding of each prospect’s business model, challenges, and potential needs.

5. Pipeline Management & Follow-ups

Maintain a disciplined, “never-drop-the-ball” approach to tracking conversations, nurturing leads, and ensuring consistent follow-ups.

6. Performance Ownership

Drive activity to achieve a minimum of 30–40 qualified first-level calls during the internship.




What We Are Looking For:-




Confidence & Communication

You are comfortable speaking with international decision-makers, especially in the North American market.

Execution & Organization

You can manage multiple conversations, schedules, and follow-ups with precision.

Sales Mindset

You have a natural ability to understand customer pain points and guide conversations toward value.

Tech Familiarity

Comfortable using LinkedIn and familiar with tools like LinkedIn Sales Navigator (preferred).




** This role is ideal for candidates who want to build a serious career in B2B sales, consulting, or growth, especially in international markets.**




Why Join Us?




Full Sales Cycle Exposure

Learn beyond lead generation—gain real experience in pipeline building, nurturing, and deal support.

Direct Mentorship

Work closely with experienced Sales Leads and Solutions experts on real business problems.

High Ownership, Real Impact

Your work directly contributes to revenue—this is a performance-driven, high-learning environment.




About Us

Express Analytics helps businesses unlock growth using AI-powered automation, customer analytics, and data-driven decision-making.




Show more

title: Intern - Growth Marketing
description:
Unconventional JD

[5 Minute Read]




There’s too much noise on LinkedIn. If you hit “Apply”, we will almost certainly never see it.

The real application instructions are at the end.




What are we building?




Soma is a co-pilot for performance marketing teams. It takes over the repetitive, operational work of running Meta ads so marketers can focus on thinking, creativity, and strategy.




Where we are:




We launched 10 months back; we work with a dozen large advertisers.
The average user spends ₹4-8 crore ($0.5M–$1M) per month on ads.
100% of paying users log in at least 3 times a week
4 of the top 20 apps in India on the Play Store are our users




The last 10 months were all product and figuring out how we can acquire customers. Now we are switching gears to start scaling our growth engine.




What this internship actually is:




Simple version:

Your job is to figure out “How do we get more people to try Soma?




If you think you will enjoy:




figuring out strategies to find companies that would find the product relevant
vibe-coding / working with tech to build infra to scale those strategies
figuring out what to say so they care
tweaking small details to get better numbers




…this will feel less like “marketing” and more like solving a series of puzzles.




Your first 2 months: Scaling the Outbound machine




We’ve cracked a playbook to acquire users through cold email --> we'll teach you everything we have learned over the last few months experimenting with this.




Your goal will be to help us scale this engine to get to 30 demos/month.




After that: 0 → 1 growth bets




Once outbound is humming, you will help find the next growth lever.




This could look like:




Simple content that pulls the right audience in.
Partnerships with communities or influencers.
Experiments on new channels.
Weird ideas that should not work on paper, but might.




You will design the experiment, launch it, measure it, and decide what to scale or kill.




Who this is for:




We usually click with people who treat work as their craft, not a checklist.




You might be a good fit if you:




Think from first principles: you can take a fuzzy problem, break it down, and decide what to try first.
Start things on your own: you notice issues and go after them without being asked.
Are tech-comfortable: basic scripts, vibe-coding, Notion, Sheets, simple automations do not scare you. (You do not need to be an engineer.)
Like speed and ownership: very little hand-holding, a lot of responsibility
Are curious about solving growth for a SaaS startup (or plan to start a SaaS / Micro SaaS startup in the future)




If you have ever built a side project, a small startup, a club, a newsletter, or a random tool for friends, you will probably enjoy this.




About the founding team:




Meher – 10 years building AI products at DigitalOcean, InMobi, Observe.ai
Ankit – nearly a decade scaling growth teams at CRED, PocketFM, Leap Finance




Role Details:




Commitment: Full-time, In-office (Indiranagar)
Duration: 3 months, option to convert to full-time
Stipend: ₹10,000 - 15,000 per month




How to apply (we actually read these):

Send an email to team@getsoma.ai with the subject line "Growth Intern"




Include:

Your resume or portfolio
One side project or startup you built (link or 2-line description)
3-4 bullet points on what traction you got and exactly how you got it




We reply to 90% emails that come our way, even if we don't go ahead.

Show more

title: Human Resources (HR) Trainee in Bangalore, Faridabad, Delhi, Gurgaon, Pune, Ghaziabad, Navi Mumbai
description:
As a Human Resources Trainee at Spinfluence Technology, you will have the opportunity to gain hands-on experience in various HR functions while working in a dynamic and innovative tech company. Your role will involve assisting with recruitment, onboarding, employee relations, and other HR activities.

Key Responsibilities Include


Assisting with recruitment process, including posting job ads, screening resumes, and scheduling interviews.
